title: Marcus St Hilaire
description: England & Ireland international rugby league footballer
extract: Marcus St Hilaire (born 26 January 1977), also known by the nickname of "Junior", is a former professional rugby league footballer who played as a fullback, wing and centre in the 1990s, 2000s and 2010s. He played at representative level for England and Ireland, and at club level for the Huddersfield Giants (two spells), Leeds Rhinos, Halifax, Bradford Bulls and Oldham.
